allow: PowerShell(cd "c:\\AIB\\Projects\\NineHawks\\With Data Matrix\\Codebase"; Start-Process -FilePath ".\\venv\\Scripts\\uvicorn.exe" -ArgumentList "app:app", "--host", "0.0.0.0", "--port", "8000", "--reload" -RedirectStandardOutput "$env:TEMP\\phonecdp_stdout.txt" -RedirectStandardError "$env:TEMP\\phonecdp_stderr.txt" -PassThru | Select-Object Id, ProcessName)

PowerShell(Start-Sleep 8; Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\phonecdp_stderr.txt" | Select-Object -Last 5; Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/results?limit=8" -Method Get | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 3 | Select-Object -First 30)

PowerShell(Get-Process -Name "python","uvicorn" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep 2; cd "c:\\AIB\\Projects\\NineHawks\\With Data Matrix\\Codebase"; Start-Process -FilePath ".\\venv\\Scripts\\uvicorn.exe" -ArgumentList "app:app","--host","0.0.0.0","--port","8000","--reload" -RedirectStandardOutput "$env:TEMP\\phonecdp_stdout.txt" -RedirectStandardError "$env:TEMP\\phonecdp_stderr.txt" -PassThru | Select-Object Id)

PowerShell($resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/patterns/1/label-pdf?size_mm=50" -Method Get -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "Status: $\($resp.StatusCode\), Content-Type: $\($resp.Headers['Content-Type']\), Size: $\($resp.Content.Length\) bytes")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/patterns/1/label-pdf?size_mm=50" -Method Get -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -TimeoutSec 60; if \($resp\) { "Status: $\($resp.StatusCode\), Content-Type: $\($resp.Headers['Content-Type']\), Size: $\($resp.Content.Length\) bytes" } else { "Failed" })

PowerShell($p = Get-Process python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Sort-Object StartTime | Select-Object -Last 1; if \($p\) { $el = \(Get-Date\) - $p.StartTime; "STILL RUNNING: elapsed $\([int]$el.TotalSeconds\)s, CPU $\([int]$p.CPU\)s" } else { "FINISHED - no python proc" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep 2; $log = Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\phonecdp_stderr.txt" -Tail 3 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $log; try { Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:8000/api/health" -TimeoutSec 5 | ConvertTo-Json -Compress } catch { "ERROR: $_" })
